text:
/ci1 2 はははっ、小細工一切無しの戦いか！
いいぞ、そういうのオレ達は好きだ！
なあ、ワルフラーンよ！

/ci1 2 Hahaha! A straight-up fight without any
underhanded tactics! That's just what we like,
isn't it, Warahram?
